revision.comment: Protected "[[Template:Shortcut/styles.css]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]] ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
turns out just the class name works fine if you don't load the same(ish) CSS twice
delete margin inside mbox, it already has a padding
move this to module, remove the > for the ul which is overly defensive in this template

Protected "[[Module:Shortcut/styles.css]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]] (will merge history after deployment) ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
Undid revision 1144571295 by [[Special:Contributions/TheDJ|TheDJ]] ([[User talk:TheDJ|talk]]) I'm sorry, that's not what we discussed or agreed to
use border color from the style guide: https://doc.wikimedia.org/codex/latest/design-tokens/border.html
1 revision imported: trying to fix templates that I messed up
1 revision imported: importing these ahead in time so that it does not mess up
1 revision imported: importing blank templates I made to fill out template blank links
1 revision imported: importing everything for the citation needed templates
1 revision imported: lets hope this fixes it since the qq=draft was showing up

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Module:Shortcut/styles.css]]

1 revision imported: importing [[Template:Commons category]] from English wikipedia with removed timestamps to overwrite existing code, attempting to fix an error that makes the link not properly appear.
1 revision imported: reimporting these to fix older errors

1 revision imported: importing this file, and also doing a full refresh import of all dependencies, because I am concerned this is one with a lot of broken dependencies. Intended end result is the template [[Template:Talk page header]] which is gonna be highly customized to our usage later on
